title: Persistent Task Runtime
description: Durable tasks live outside the chat transcript.

steps.content: Create a durable task list for the docs overhaul and show me what is open.
steps.annotation: The request targets long-lived runtime state.

steps.content: {"title":"Rewrite onboarding section","details":"Align docs with new chapter sequence"}
steps.annotation: A persistent task is created in task storage, not only in chat.

steps.content: Created task task-1 [open] Rewrite onboarding section
steps.annotation: The task now has its own durable identity.
The model queries the persistent store directly.
Durable work can be inspected independently of transcript length.

steps.content: The docs overhaul now exists as persistent runtime state, separate from the session checklist.
steps.annotation: This separates durable work tracking from temporary session planning.
